member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiLogsManager.CloudAiLogsConfigurator
member.summary: Configures logging for cloud-based environments.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiLogsManager.CloudAiLogsConfigurator.ConfigureLogs
member.summary: Configures and returns an instance of the logger for cloud environments.
member.returns: An instance of configured for cloud logging.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiLogsManager.CloudAiLogsConfigurator.GetLog4NetConfig
member.summary: Retrieves and updates the log4net XML configuration for cloud logging.
member.returns: An containing the log4net configuration.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiLogsManager.CloudAiLogsConfigurator.UpdateXmlNode(System.Xml.XmlDocument,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Updates the specified XML node with the given value.
member.param: The XML document to modify.
The XPath query specifying the node to update.
The new value to set in the node.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiLogsManager.IAiLogsConfigurator
member.summary: Defines a contract for configuring AI logs.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiLogsManager.IAiLogsConfigurator.ConfigureLogs
member.summary: Configures and returns an instance of the logger.
member.returns: An instance of configured for logging.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiLogsManager.OnPremiseAiLogsConfigurator
member.summary: Configures logging for on-premise environments.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiLogsManager.OnPremiseAiLogsConfigurator.ConfigureLogs
member.summary: Configures and returns an instance of the logger for on-premise environments.
member.returns: An instance of configured for on-premise logging.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiServiceConfigManager.GeneralAiServiceConfigurator
member.summary: Provides configuration and initialization methods for AI-related services.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiServiceConfigManager.GeneralAiServiceConfigurator.InitializeCommonConfiguration(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Configures and initializes AI service settings.
member.param: The used to configure the application.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiServiceConfigManager.IAiServiceConfigurator
member.summary: Defines a contract for configuring AI services.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiServiceConfigManager.IAiServiceConfigurator.Configure(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Configures the AI service settings and dependencies.
member.param: The configuration instance containing the application settings.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiServiceConfigManager.LocalDebugConfigurator
member.summary: Configures AI service settings for local debugging by binding values from the configuration.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiServiceConfigManager.LocalDebugConfigurator.Configure(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Configures AI service settings by binding configuration values to application settings.
member.param: The configuration instance containing the application settings.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiServiceConfigManager.OnPremiseAiServiceConfigurator
member.summary: Configures AI service settings for on-premise deployments by binding values from the configuration.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiServiceConfigManager.OnPremiseAiServiceConfigurator.Configure(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Configures AI service settings by binding configuration values to application settings.
member.param: The configuration instance containing the application settings.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AiServiceConfigManager.OnPremiseAiServiceConfigurator.GetSubApps(System.Uri)
member.summary: Asynchronously extracts sub-application path segments from the given URI.
member.param: The URI to process. If null or without segments, an empty list is returned.
member.returns: A representing the asynchronous operation. The result contains a list of sub-application segments in lowercase.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.AILicenseKeyAuthentication
member.summary: An authorization filter that validates API requests based on a license key.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.AILicenseKeyAuthentication.#ctor(BoldBi.Ai.Base.Helpers.DatabaseContext.AppDbContext,BoldBi.Ai.Base.Helpers.ErrorMessageProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.AILicenseKeyAuthentication.OnAuthorizationAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.AuthorizationFilterContext)
member.summary: Asynchronously checks if the request contains a valid license key.
member.param: The authorization filter context for the current request.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.AILicenseKeyAuthentication.IsAllowedAPIKey(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the provided API key is valid and active.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.AILicenseKeyAuthentication.IsAllowedTenantId(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the provided API key is valid and active.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.AILicenseKeyAuthentication.IsAllowedToken(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the provided API key is valid and active.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.AILicenseKeyAuthentication.UnauthorizedResponse(System.String)
member.summary: Returns an unauthorized response with an error message.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.ConnectionCheckActionFilter
member.summary: An action filter that checks the validity of an AI connection before executing an action.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.ConnectionCheckActionFilter.#ctor(BoldBi.Ai.Core.ConnectionValidation.AiConnection,BoldBi.Ai.Base.Helpers.ErrorMessageProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The AI connection handler used to validate the connection.
The error message provider.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.ConnectionCheckActionFilter.OnActionExecuting(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.ActionExecutingContext)
member.summary: Called after the action method executes. This method checks if the AI connection is valid and prevents execution if the validation fails.
member.param: The context for the action being executed.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.OnPremiseInitializationServiceFilter
member.summary: Service-based action filter that performs on-premise initialization. Register this filter in DI and use with `[TypeFilter(typeof(OnPremiseInitializationServiceFilter))]`.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.OnPremiseInitializationServiceFilter.#ctor
member.summary: Service-based action filter that performs on-premise initialization.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.OnPremiseInitializationServiceFilter.OnActionExecutionAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.ActionExecutingContext,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.ActionExecutionDelegate)
member.summary: Executes initialization logic before the action runs when compiled for on-premise.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.RateLimitHelper
member.summary: Helper class for rate limiting and authorization. Implements to handle authorization asynchronously.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.RateLimitHelper.#ctor(BoldBi.Ai.Base.CacheServices.IMemoryCacheService,BoldBi.Ai.Base.Helpers.DatabaseContext.AppDbContext,BoldBi.Ai.Base.Helpers.ErrorMessageProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: An instance of used for caching rate limit data.
An instance of used for db connection.
The error message provider.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.RateLimitHelper.OnAuthorizationAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.AuthorizationFilterContext)
member.summary: Handles authorization and rate limiting asynchronously. Checks the provided license key and enforces rate limits based on user data.
member.param: The authorization filter context for the current request.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.RateLimitHelper.HandleSandboxPlanAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.AuthorizationFilterContext,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,BoldBi.Ai.Base.Helpers.DatabaseContext.AppDbContext)
member.summary: Handles requests for sandbox plan users (plan 5), including user validation and rate limiting.
member.param: The authorization filter context for the current request.
The HTTP context for the current request.
The database context for accessing user data.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.RateLimitHelper.HandlePaidPlan(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.AuthorizationFilterContext,System.String)
member.summary: Handles requests for paid plan users, checking for rate limit and balance.
member.param: The authorization filter context for the current request.
The license key of the user.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.RateLimitHelper.HandleSiteBasedCredit(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.AuthorizationFilterContext,System.String)
member.summary: Handles site based requests for paid plan users, checking for rate limit and balance.
member.param: The authorization filter context for the current request.
The siteId for which the remaining balance amount is being fetched.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.RateLimitHelper.IsRequestAllowed(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Determines if the request is allowed based on the rate limit.
member.param: The license key for which the request limit is being checked.
The siteId for which the remaining balance amount is being fetched.
member.returns: A tuple containing a boolean indicating if the request is allowed, and an integer for the maximum allowed requests per minute.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.RateLimitHelper.FetchRequestLimit(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Fetches the request limit for a given license key from the cache.
member.param: The license key for which the request limit is being fetched.
The siteId for which the remaining balance amount is being fetched.
member.returns: The maximum number of allowed requests per minute.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.RateLimitHelper.FetchRemainingAmount(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Fetches the remaining balance amount for a given license key from the database.
member.param: The license key for which the remaining balance amount is being fetched.
The siteId for which the remaining balance amount is being fetched.
member.returns: The remaining balance amount for the license key.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.RateLimitHelper.SetRateLimitExceeded(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.AuthorizationFilterContext,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Sets the rate limit exceeded result and returns an appropriate response.
member.param: The authorization filter context.
The status code for the response, typically 429 (Too Many Requests).
The remaining balance amount, if applicable.
The maximum allowed rate limit, if applicable.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.StaticTokenAuthentication
member.summary: An authorization filter that validates requests based on a static token.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.StaticTokenAuthentication.#ctor(BoldBi.Ai.Base.Helpers.ErrorMessageProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The error message provider.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Authentication.StaticTokenAuthentication.OnAuthorizationAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.AuthorizationFilterContext)
member.summary: Asynchronously checks if the request contains a valid static token.
member.param: The context for the authorization filter.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AzureBlobStorage.AzureBlobStorage
member.summary: Provides functionality for interacting with Azure Blob Storage.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified connection string and container name.
member.param: The Azure Blob Storage connection string.
The name of the Blob Storage container.
member.exception: Thrown when connection string or container name is null or empty.

member.name: P:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AzureBlobStorage.AzureBlobStorage.BlobContainer
member.summary: Gets or sets the Blob container client.

member.name: P:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AzureBlobStorage.AzureBlobStorage.ContainerName
member.summary: Gets or sets the container name.

member.summary: Sets up a reference to the Azure Blob Storage container.
member.param: The connection string for the storage account.
The name of the container.
member.returns: A instance representing the container.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AzureBlobStorage.AzureBlobStorage.DownloadToStreamAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Downloads a blob to a stream.
member.param: The name of the source blob.
member.returns: A object indicating the success or failure of the operation.
member.exception: Thrown if is null or empty.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AzureBlobStorage.GlobalAppSettings
member.summary: Provides global application settings for storage and proxy configurations.

member.name: P:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AzureBlobStorage.GlobalAppSettings.AzureBlob
member.summary: Gets or sets the Azure Blob storage configuration.

member.name: P:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AzureBlobStorage.GlobalAppSettings.IsAzureApplication
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the application is running in an Azure environment.

member.name: P:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AzureBlobStorage.GlobalAppSettings.IsBlobStorage
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Blob Storage is enabled.

member.name: P:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AzureBlobStorage.GlobalAppSettings.BlobSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets the blob storage settings.

member.name: P:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AzureBlobStorage.GlobalAppSettings.ProxySettings
member.summary: Gets or sets the proxy settings.

member.summary: Initializes application settings from the configuration.
member.param: The application configuration.
The application blob response.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AzureBlobStorage.GlobalAppSettings.InitializeAzureBlobAppSettingKeys(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes application settings from the configuration.
member.param: The application configuration.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AzureBlobStorage.GlobalAppSettings.GetAzureBlobStorage
member.summary: Gets an instance of Azure Blob Storage.
member.returns: A configured Azure Blob Storage instance.
member.exception: Thrown if BlobSettings is not initialized.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.AzureBlobStorage.GlobalAppSettings.GetAzureConnectionString(System.String,System.String,System.String,BoldBi.Ai.Core.Enums.AzureBlobConnectionType)
member.summary: Constructs an Azure Blob Storage connection string.
member.param: The Azure Blob Storage account name.
The access key for the storage account.
The Blob Storage URL.
The type of connection.
member.returns: A formatted connection string.
member.exception: Thrown if account name or access key is null or empty.

member.summary: Defines the environment variable names used by Bold services for hosting and storage configuration.

member.summary: The environment variable name that specifies the hosting environment.

member.name: F:BoldBi.Ai.Service.BoldServicesEnvironmentVariables.StorageType
member.summary: The environment variable name that specifies the resource storage provider type.

member.name: F:BoldBi.Ai.Service.BoldServicesEnvironmentVariables.AmazonRegion
member.summary: The environment variable name for the AWS region.

member.name: F:BoldBi.Ai.Service.BoldServicesEnvironmentVariables.AmazonBucketName
member.summary: The environment variable name for the Amazon S3 bucket name used by Bold services.

member.summary: The environment variable name for the AWS access key ID.

member.summary: The environment variable name for the AWS secret access key.

member.summary: The environment variable name for the root folder (prefix) within the Amazon S3 bucket.

member.summary: The environment variable name for the OCI region.

member.summary: The environment variable name for the root folder (prefix) within the OCI bucket.

member.name: F:BoldBi.Ai.Service.BoldServicesEnvironmentVariables.OCINameSpace
member.summary: The environment variable name for the OCI Object Storage namespace.

member.summary: Returns the stream’s UTF-8 content without disposing the stream.
member.param: The stream to read; rewound before and after reading.
member.returns: The full contents of the stream as a string.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.ConfigManager.FileConfigReader.GetAzurePrivateKey(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.ConfigurationManager)
member.summary: Downloads the private key file (privatekeys.dat) from Azure Blob Storage and returns its content as a string.
member.param: The application configuration manager instance.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.ConfigManager.FileConfigReader.GetOciPrivateKey(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.ConfigurationManager)
member.summary: Downloads the private key file (privatekeys.dat) from OCI Object Storage and returns its content as a string.
member.param: The application configuration manager instance.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.ConfigManager.FileConfigReader.GetAmazonS3PrivateKey(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.ConfigurationManager)
member.summary: Downloads the private key file (privatekeys.dat) from Amazon S3 and returns its content as a string.
member.param: The application configuration manager instance.
member.returns: Private key content as a string, or null if download fails.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.ConfigManager.FileConfigReader.UpdateInternalInformation(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Updates internal information using the provided application configuration.
member.param: An instance of that provides application settings.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.ConfigManager.FileConfigReader.UpdateConfigDetails(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the details of an AI tenant from the provided JSON input and updates the in-memory configuration.
member.param: The JSON string containing the configuration details to apply.
member.returns: A task that resolves to an indicating success or failure.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.ConfigManager.FileConfigReader.UpdateStorageCredentials(System.String)
member.summary: Updates storage details based on the provided API payload. Supports FileStorage and OCIObjectStorage.
member.param: API response JSON containing data.storage_type and storage credentials.
member.returns: Status-only response.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.ConfigManager.FileConfigReader.GetOciStorage
member.summary: Returns the current Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Storage configuration. If credentials were previously updated via UpdateOCiStorageDetails(), returns those values. Otherwise returns an object with empty/default values.
member.returns: An containing the OCI storage configuration.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.ConfigManager.FileConfigReader.GetAmazonS3Storage
member.summary: Builds an Amazon S3 storage configuration by reading required values from global variable.
member.returns: An populated from environment variables.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.ConfigManager.FileConfigReader.GetAzureBlobStorage
member.summary: Builds an Azure blob storage configuration by reading required values from global variable.
member.returns: An populated from environment variables.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController
member.summary: Controller for handling AI assistance operations including chat, QnA, sessions, and feedback.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session manager for handling session-related operations.
The service for processing AI-related operations.
The DB context used to log usage data.
summarize the widget insights and dashboard summary
visual creation operation for Qna Widgets

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.ValidateConnectionAsync
member.summary: Validates the connection by checking the provided details.
member.returns: HTTP 200 OK if the connection is valid, or an appropriate error response.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.SendRequestAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Sends a chat message to the AI and processes the response.
member.param: The chat message input in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the AI response.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.SendExpressionRequestAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Sends a expression message to the AI and processes the response.
member.param: The chat message input in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the AI response.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.FormatQueryResultRequestAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Sends a chat message to the AI and processes the response.
member.param: The chat message input in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the AI response.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.QnaSendRequestAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Sends a QnA message to the AI and retrieves the response.
member.param: The QnA message input in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the AI response to the QnA message.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.StartSessionAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Starts a new AI session.
member.param: The session data in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the result of session creation.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.EndSessionAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Ends an existing AI session.
member.param: The session data in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the result of session termination.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.AiAssistanceAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Processes sample queries and retrieves relevant AI responses.
member.param: The sample queries input in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing relevant responses for the queries.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.UpdateFeedbackAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Updates feedback information provided by the user.
member.param: The feedback data in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the result of the feedback update.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.RetrieveFeedbackAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Retrieves feedback information based on the provided input.
member.param: The feedback query in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the retrieved feedback information.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.GetAiSummaryAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Retrieves AI summary for widget, dashboard and data points
member.param: Details for generating summary

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.UpdateAssistantResponseAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Asynchronously updates the assistance response based on the provided JSON input.
member.param: The JSON-formatted containing containing the assistance response details.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.UpdateWidgetRenderStatus(System.Object)
member.summary: updates the widget status in db
member.param: Details for widget status

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.GenerateAiDashboardAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Sends a query to the AI and processes.
member.param: The query input in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the AI response.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.GetMatchedDatasourceAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Sends a input to the AI and processes.
member.param: The query nad data sources input in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the AI response.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.CheckDashboardQuestionAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Sends a input to the AI and processes.
member.param: The query had data sources input in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the AI response.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiAssistanceController.GenerateSynonyms(System.Object)
member.summary: HTTP POST endpoint that triggers synonyms generation using the provided JSON payload.
member.param: The request body containing the input required for synonyms generation.
member.returns: An object representing the AI-generated synonyms response, or an error payload if processing fails.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiPricingLoggerController
member.summary: Controller for handling AI pricing log requests.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiPricingLoggerController.#ctor(BoldBi.Ai.Base.Helpers.DatabaseHelpers.FetchFromDb)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiPricingLoggerController.GetMessageUsageAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Retrieves pricing information for a specific search message by its ID.
member.param: The ID of the search message.
member.returns: A JSON string containing the pricing details of the specified search message.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiPricingLoggerController.GetSessionUsageAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Retrieves pricing information for a specific session by its ID.
member.param: The ID of the session.
member.returns: A JSON string containing the pricing details of the specified session.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiPricingLoggerController.GetUserUsageLogAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Retrieves usage logs for a specific user based on their email address.
member.param: The email address of the user whose usage logs are to be retrieved.
member.returns: A JSON string containing the usage log details for the specified user.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiPricingLoggerController.GetTenantUsageLogAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Retrieves usage logs for a specific tenant based on the license key and optional date range.
member.param: The tenant whose usage logs are to be retrieved.
member.returns: A JSON string containing the usage log details for the specified tenant

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.AiPricingLoggerController.GetAiUsageAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Retrieves usage details for session, today and remaining
member.param: Contains the sessionId and tenantId
member.returns: A json string containing the usage details for specified session, date and tenant

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.CredentialsController
member.summary: API Controller for managing AI credentials. Provides endpoints to validate and save AI configuration credentials.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.CredentialsController.#ctor(BoldBi.Ai.Base.CredentialManager)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The helper class for managing credentials.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.CredentialsController.ValidateCredentialsAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Validates the provided AI configuration credentials.
member.param: The credentials to validate, provided as an object.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the result of the validation as an object. The result indicates whether the credentials are valid.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.CredentialsController.IsValidAiKeyAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if a tenant is allowed access based on the provided tenant ID.
member.param: The ID of the tenant to check access for, provided in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing a result that indicates whether the tenant is allowed access. Returns a boolean or equivalent response structure indicating access permissions.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.DataSummarizationController
member.summary: Controller dedicated to handling data summarization requests.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.DataSummarizationController.#ctor(BoldBi.Ai.Base.Contracts.ISessionManager,BoldBi.Ai.Base.Helpers.DatabaseContext.UsageLogDbContext,BoldBi.Ai.Base.Contracts.IAiSummarizationOperations)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session manager for handling session-related operations.
The DB context used to log usage data.
summarize the widget insights and dashboard summary.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.DataSummarizationController.Summarize(System.Object)
member.summary: Accepts raw JSON data for summarization. The end-to-end processing pipeline will be wired up in a subsequent task.
member.param: The payload containing only the data to summarize.
member.returns: A placeholder response until the summarization process is fully implemented.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.LicenseManageController
member.summary: Controller for managing AI licenses, including adding, updating, removing, deactivating, and retrieving license details.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.LicenseManageController.#ctor(BoldBi.Ai.Base.Helpers.ManageLicense.LicenseManageHelper)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The helper class for managing licenses.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.LicenseManageController.AddAiLicense(System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a new AI license based on the provided license information.
member.param: The license information to be added in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing a result that indicates the success or failure of the operation.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.LicenseManageController.UpdateAiLicense(System.Object)
member.summary: Updates an existing AI license with the provided license information.
member.param: The updated license information in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing a result that indicates the success or failure of the operation.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.LicenseManageController.RemoveAiLicense(System.Object)
member.summary: Removes an AI license based on the provided tenant ID.
member.param: The ID of the tenant whose license is to be removed, provided in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing a result that indicates the success or failure of the operation.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.LicenseManageController.DeactivateAiLicense(System.Object)
member.summary: Deactivates an AI license based on the provided tenant ID.
member.param: The ID of the tenant whose license is to be deactivated, provided in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing a result that indicates the success or failure of the operation.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.LicenseManageController.EnableAiLicense(System.Object)
member.summary: Enables an AI license based on the provided tenant ID.
member.param: The ID of the tenant whose license is to be deactivated, provided in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing a result that indicates the success or failure of the operation.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.LicenseManageController.GetLicenseDetails(System.Object)
member.summary: Retrieves details of an AI license based on the provided license key.
member.param: The AI key to fetch details for, provided in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the details associated with the provided license key.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.LicenseManageController.GetAllSites(System.Object)
member.summary: Updates an existing AI license with the provided license information.
member.param: The updated license information in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing a result that indicates the success or failure of the operation.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.ServerController
member.summary: Controller for server-level configuration endpoints.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.ServerController.UpdateConfig(System.Object)
member.summary: Updates AI Service configuration using the supplied JSON payload.
member.param: Config data in JSON format for update.
member.returns: An indicating success or failure.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.TenantController
member.summary: Controller for managing tenant-related operations, including access checks, license balance retrieval, license activation, and sandbox user management.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.TenantController.#ctor(BoldBi.Ai.Base.Helpers.SandboxUsersHelper,BoldBi.Ai.Base.Helpers.DatabaseHelpers.FetchFromDb,BoldBi.Ai.Base.Helpers.ManageLicense.TenantBasedCreditsHelper)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The helper class for managing tenant.
The helper class for managing DB.
The helper class for managing tenant.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.TenantController.IsAllowedTenantAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if a tenant is allowed access based on the provided tenant ID.
member.param: The ID of the tenant to check access for, provided in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing a result that indicates whether the tenant is allowed access. Returns a boolean or equivalent response structure indicating access permissions.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.TenantController.GetBalanceAmountAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Retrieves the balance amount for a given license key.
member.param: The license key to fetch the balance amount for, provided in JSON format.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the balance amount associated with the provided license key. Returns a numerical value or equivalent response structure representing the balance.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.TenantController.ActivateLicenseAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Activates an AI license based on the input provided.
member.param: The JSON input containing the license details to activate.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the result of the license activation. Returns a response structure indicating the success or failure of the activation operation.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.TenantController.InsertSandboxUsersAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Inserts a new sandbox user based on the input provided.
member.param: The JSON input containing the sandbox user details.
member.returns: An asynchronous task containing the result of the user insertion. Returns a response structure indicating the success or failure of the insertion operation.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.TenantController.IsAITenantExists(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks AI tenant exists in the database.
member.param: The license object containing AI tenant details in JSON format.
member.returns: An object indicating success or failure of the operation.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.TenantController.AddAiTenant(System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a new AI tenant to the database.
member.param: The license object containing AI tenant details in JSON format.
member.returns: An object representing the API response, indicating success or failure of the operation.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.TenantController.UpdateAiTenant(System.Object)
member.summary: Updates an existing AI tenant's details in the database.
member.param: The license object containing updated AI tenant details in JSON format.
member.returns: An object representing the API response, indicating success or failure of the update operation.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.TenantController.DeleteAiTenant(System.Object)
member.summary: Deactivates an AI tenant in the database.
member.param: The license object containing AI tenant details in JSON format for deactivation.
member.returns: An object representing the API response, indicating success or failure of the deactivation operation.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.TenantController.GetDetailsOfTenant(System.Object)
member.summary: Retrieves the details of an AI tenant from the database.
member.param: The license object containing AI tenant details in JSON format for retrieval.
member.returns: An object containing the AI tenant details or an API response indicating failure.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.TokenController
member.summary: Controller for handling token-related operations.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.TokenController.GenerateTokenAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Generates an encrypted token based on the provided AI key JSON.
member.param: An object containing the AI key in JSON format.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the generated token.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.TokenController.GenerateTokenForIDAsync
member.summary: Generates an encrypted token based on the provided AI key JSON.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the generated token.

member.returns: The classification response as an object.

member.summary: Handles the visual creation.
member.param: The input object containing the chat query in JSON format.
member.returns: The classification response as an object.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.Controllers.UnifiedAIAssistanceController.DashboardSummaryAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Handles the dashboard summary.

member.returns: The classification response as an object.

member.summary: Handles the textual response SQL query.

member.returns: The classification response as an object.

member.summary: Retrieves the name of the session.

member.summary: Store the history of the session.

member.summary: Retrieves the history of the session.

member.returns: The response as an object.

member.summary: Rename the session.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.DashboardConstants
member.summary: Provides constant folder and service names used throughout the dashboard application.

member.summary: The root application data folder name.

member.name: F:BoldBi.Ai.Service.DashboardConstants.Bi
member.summary: The BI segment.

member.name: F:BoldBi.Ai.Service.DashboardConstants.DataService
member.summary: The data service segment/folder name.

member.name: F:BoldBi.Ai.Service.DashboardConstants.DesignTimeCache
member.summary: The design-time cache folder name.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.ExceptionMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware to handle exceptions globally and log errors.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.ExceptionMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The next middleware delegate in the request pipeline.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.ExceptionMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Invokes the middleware to process HTTP requests and handle exceptions.
member.param: The HTTP context of the current request.
member.returns: A task that represents the completion of request processing.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper
member.summary: Provides Amazon S3 file storage operations such as upload, download, delete, and metadata queries. Wraps an client and implements .

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.#ctor(BoldBi.Ai.Base.FileStorage.AmazonS3Response)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class using the given configuration.
member.param: The S3 configuration (credentials, bucket, region, root folder).

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with explicit parameters.
member.param: AWS access key ID.
AWS secret access key.
S3 bucket name.
AWS region system name (e.g., "us-east-1").
Logical root folder (prefix) inside the bucket.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.ValidateConnectionAsync
member.summary: Validates the S3 connection by querying the bucket location.
member.returns: True if the bucket is reachable (HTTP 200); otherwise false.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.GetAllFilesAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Lists all file keys under the specified directory (prefix).
member.param: The directory/prefix to search (uses forward slashes).
member.returns: A list of object keys found under the prefix.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.GetFileUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the canonical key for an S3 object if it exists.
member.param: The object key (path) to check.
member.returns: The object key if it exists; otherwise null.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.UploadFromStreamAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Uploads content from a stream to the specified S3 object key.
member.param: The source stream.
The destination object key.
Optional last-modified metadata value.
member.returns: True if upload succeeds; otherwise false.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.UploadTextAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Uploads the provided text as an object to S3 at the specified key.
member.param: The content to upload.
The destination object key.
Optional last-modified metadata value.
member.returns: True if upload succeeds; otherwise false.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.DownloadToStreamAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Downloads an S3 object into a memory stream.
member.param: The object key to download.
member.returns: A stream positioned at the beginning with the downloaded content.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.DeleteFileAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes an S3 object at the specified key.
member.param: The object key to delete.
member.returns: True if delete succeeds; otherwise false.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.DownloadToTextAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Downloads an S3 object and returns its contents as a UTF-8 string.
member.param: The object key to download.
member.returns: The object content as text, or null if the operation fails.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.FileExistsAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether an S3 object exists at the specified key.
member.param: The object key to check.
member.returns: True if the object exists; otherwise false.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.UpdatePathIfRequired(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Prepends the configured root, app_data, bi, and optional segments (dataservice, designtimecache) to a relative file path.
member.param: The relative file path.
If true, omits the design-time cache folder from the path.
If true, omits the dataservice folder from the path.
member.returns: The updated file path with required prefixes.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.GetLastModifiedTimeAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the last modified date of the most recently changed object under a prefix.
member.param: The object key or prefix to query.
member.returns: The most recent for matching objects, or if not found.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.CreateDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a directory placeholder if needed. For S3, returns true (folders are virtual).
member.param: The directory name or prefix.
member.returns: Always true unless an exception occurs.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.AmazonS3Helper.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the underlying client and suppresses finalization.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.OCIHelper
member.summary: Provides Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Object Storage operations using the S3-compatible API. Implements to perform common file operations such as upload, download, list, and delete.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.OCIHelper.#ctor(BoldBi.Ai.Base.FileStorage.OCIResponse)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class using the provided OCI configuration.
member.param: The OCI configuration containing namespace, region, credentials, and bucket details.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.OCIHelper.GetAllFilesAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Lists all file keys under a specified directory (prefix).
member.param: The directory/prefix to list. If null or empty, lists the bucket root.
member.returns: A list of object keys found under the given prefix.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.OCIHelper.UploadFromStreamAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Uploads content from a stream to the specified object key.
member.param: The source stream to upload.
The object key (path) to write to.
Optional last-modified metadata value (not used by OCI helper).
member.returns: True if the upload succeeds; otherwise false.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.OCIHelper.UploadTextAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Uploads the provided text to the specified object key.
member.param: The text content to upload.
The object key (path) to write to.
Optional last-modified metadata value (not used by OCI helper).
member.returns: True if the upload succeeds; otherwise false.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.OCIHelper.GetFileUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the public URL (object address) for a given object key.
member.param: The object key (file name) to address.
member.returns: A URL string pointing to the object in OCI Object Storage.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.OCIHelper.DownloadToStreamAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Downloads an object into a stream.
member.param: The object key to download.
member.returns: A readable stream of the object content.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.OCIHelper.DownloadToTextAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Downloads an object and returns its contents as a UTF-8 string.
member.param: The object key to download.
member.returns: The object content as text.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.OCIHelper.DeleteFileAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes an object from the bucket.
member.param: The object key to delete.
member.returns: True if the delete operation returns HTTP 204 (NoContent); otherwise false.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.OCIHelper.FileExistsAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether an object exists at the specified key.
member.param: The object key to check.
member.returns: True if the object exists; otherwise false.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.OCIHelper.UpdatePathIfRequired(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Updates a path if required. For OCI, this is a pass-through unless additional logic is needed.
member.param: The input file path or key.
Ignored in OCI helper.
Ignored in OCI helper.
member.returns: The unchanged file path.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.OCIHelper.GetLastModifiedTimeAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the last modified date/time for the specified object.
member.param: The object key to inspect.
member.returns: The last modified value.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.OCIHelper.CreateDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a directory placeholder. For OCI (S3-compatible), creates a zero-byte object ending with '/'.
member.param: The directory name to create.
member.returns: True if the creation succeeds; otherwise false.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.FileStorageHelper.OCIHelper.Dispose
member.summary: Releases resources associated with the underlying S3-compatible client.

member.name: T:BoldBi.Ai.Service.LocalServiceUrlHelper
member.summary: Returns the effective Local Service URL or, if none is set via environment, the path to the local_service_url.json under a given base folder.

member.name: F:BoldBi.Ai.Service.LocalServiceUrlHelper.IDUrlEnvKey
member.summary: Environment variable name for the base Identity (IdP) web service URL.

member.name: F:BoldBi.Ai.Service.LocalServiceUrlHelper.IDApiUrlEnvKey
member.summary: Environment variable name for the Identity API base URL.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.LocalServiceUrlHelper.GetLocalServiceUrlPath
member.summary: Determines whether both IdP environment variables are present and non-empty.
member.returns: True if both and are set (non-whitespace); otherwise, false.

member.name: M:BoldBi.Ai.Service.LocalServiceUrlHelper.GetEnvironmentLocalServiceUrlsJson
member.summary: Builds the LocalServiceUrls JSON string from environment variables (Idp and IdpApi). Assumes both environment variables are present. Use to check first.
member.returns: A JSON string representing { "Idp": "...", "IdpApi": "..." }.
